_doc: Map: figure number (or 'appendix-N') → canonical asset under data/analysis/figures/. After pandoc renders the .docx, paper/build.py rewrites each to point at the canonical asset so the final PDF ships the in-repo figure (current at HEAD) instead of whatever bitmap is embedded in the .docx. Add new entries as the manuscript grows. format=svg or pdf → vector (no DPI check); format=png → min_dpi enforced via Pillow. Set 'optional': true on entries that may not yet have a canonical asset (build warns rather than errors). 'description' is for the author's reference only — not used by the build.

1.description: Flow diagram of the v2 deep-dive pipeline (Illustrator-exported)

2.description: Distribution of final deep-dive categories across the ~5k cohort (MOCK)

1.description: Triage reason × deep-dive reason confusion matrix, colored by yes/contextual/no bucket (MOCK)
